title.en: A Bone Transformation Eternal Giant Ape entered...

content.en:
Whoa!!!

A Bone Transformation Eternal Giant Ape entered the holes one by one.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and went in directly.

Anyway, it's a replica body, even if it's really dangerous, the loss is lost.

If there is an unexpected gain, wouldn't it be blood-earned!

......

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered one of the holes in this black giant mountain, and a terrifying force sucked him in.

Being able to make him have no ability to resist in his four bone transformation realm replica bodies shows that this black giant mountain is very extraordinary.

In a flash.

He came to a mysterious place.

As soon as I entered, black text appeared.

There are nine black texts in total.

"Comprehend the Haven on the Other Side!"

A set of information is delivered.

"Haven on the other side!"

This is not the first time Ye Tian has come to the land of the other side of eternity, and the reason for the land on the other side is from the words of the other side.

And the other side of the script is divided into two kinds, one is the other side of the gold script, the other is the other side of the black script.

It is rumored that the Golden Script on the other side is similar to the Taikoo Golden Script, but the grade is higher.

If you comprehend the golden inscription on the other side, it will be easier to create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique.

Thus.

If there is enough Golden Wen on the other side, he can create a Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, which can easily make an Ancient Genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm impact the Bone Transformation Realm.

However, the golden inscriptions on the other side are extremely rare, and they are all in the hands of some terrifying forces.

Ye Tian couldn't reach that kind of force now, so it was impossible for him to obtain a golden text from the other side at present.

The other side of the text is different, this kind of writing is not an evil force, and it is also a very valuable text, only slightly lower than the other side of the gold script, but it is much more valuable than the ancient gold script.

Comprehend the Haven on the Other Side, and hopefully create the art of the Other Side.

The art of the other side wields the power of immeasurable will!

Therefore, contemplating the Haven on the other side will help to refine the immeasurable will and make the immeasurable will continue to strengthen.

It is rumored that after reaching the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, if you want to continue to break through, the immeasurable will must reach a certain standard, which cannot be reached at all under normal circumstances, so you must use the Haven on the other side to refine the immeasurable will.

The art of the other side is different from the ancient technique, from the point of view of grade, the art of the other side is higher than the general top primeval technique, but the power of the other side of the art is not in terms of attack power, defense and other aspects.

The art of the other side is more of a secondary effect, using the power of immeasurable will to exert some miraculous effects, so as to play a decisive treasure in battle.

If they are both primordial-level geniuses, they both master similar top-notch primeval techniques, and their cultivation is similar, and if the other party masters a technique that helps to change the situation, then the result of the battle may be one-sided.

But.

Ye Tian had seen very few bone transformation realms, and he had never seen anyone who had mastered the technique of the other side.

"I didn't expect this place to have the inheritance of the Haven on the other side, if the news spreads, it will be terrible!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It should be that every bone transformation realm can only come to participate in the assessment once, and if it fails, there is no way to come in again.

And the six Eternal Giant Apes of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm are estimated to have not obtained a few Haven on the Other Side, so they let the entire clan come to participate in the assessment, if some of them have comprehended a Haven on the Other Side, they will find a way to engrave it after they go back and give it to other clansmen.

In this way, the Eternal Great Ape Clan will have access to a large amount of Haven from the other side.

It can be said that the six Eternal Giant Apes of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm have a very good idea, but it is not clear how many Eternal Giant Apes can comprehend a Haven on the other side.

"This is my chance, I must seize this opportunity and learn more about the other side of the haven!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the golden text on the other side here.

And his other replica bodies are also fully contemplating in other places.

"There are a total of nine Haven on the Other Side, starting with the first Haven on the Other Side!"

Ye Tian silently came to his senses.

I have to say that the Haven on the other side is too mysterious, and it is the first time for him to understand this kind of Haven on the other side, and he doesn't know about the Haven on the other side.

Time flies.

After a long period of time, he finally understood the first Haven on the other side.

"It's successful! I should be many times faster than the other bone transformation realms!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After all, he has now fused a large number of primeval-level ancestral endowments, and his talent is naturally higher than others, and he doesn't know how much.

Subsequently.

He began to comprehend the second Haven on the other side.

Another period of time has passed, and the second Haven on the other side has also understood it thoroughly.

And then there's the third Beyond Haven!

The fourth Beyond Haven!

The fifth Haven on the other side!

......

A tenth of the primeval years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally comprehended all the nine Havens on the other side.

"I don't know how many times more difficult to comprehend than the ancient golden inscription, it is simply not a grade, so the more advanced golden inscription on the other side is even more difficult to comprehend. Even if they have comprehended the Golden Text on the other side, they can easily create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, but the others are stumped at the step of comprehending the Golden Text on the other side!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After comprehending the nine Havens of the Other Side, he passed this level.

Next, the second level appears.

Airplanes!!!!!

Some Beyond Haven appeared in the void, a total of thirty-six Beyond Haven.

"Understand the thirty-six Havens on the other side!"

This is the difficulty of this level.

"I've already understood the nine Havens on the Other Side, and I have some understanding of the Haven on the Other Side, and I should be able to comprehend them much faster now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He continued to contemplate the thirty-six Havens of the Other Side.

Finally, after one-fifth of the primeval era, he comprehended the thirty-six Haven on the other side and passed the second level.

Then, the third level of assessment came.

Airplanes!!!

A dense network of Haven on the other side appeared, this time it was 365 Haven on the other side.

"There are so many Havens on the other side this time!"

Ye Tian didn't find it difficult, he only felt very excited.

In this way, he can learn more about the Haven of the Other Side.

In the years that followed, he continued to comprehend these Beyond Haven, striving to be able to comprehend all of them in an ancient era.

Beyond the Black Mountains.

One after another the Eternal Giant Ape came out, and when they reached the time limit, they did not comprehend the Haven on the other side, and they were directly moved out, and they could no longer enter.

Of course.

Occasionally, there was an Eternal Giant Ape with a very good understanding who had comprehended a Horizontal Text on the other side, which made those Eternal Giant Ape of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm excited.
